allow: PowerShell($chrome = "C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"; $out = "C:\\Users\\Carlos Geschäftlich\\Documents\\coding\\corporate-website\\_preview_full.png"; & $chrome --headless=new --disable-gpu --hide-scrollbars --force-device-scale-factor=1 --window-size=1440,7600 --virtual-time-budget=9000 --screenshot="$out" "http://localhost:4599/" 2>$null; if \(Test-Path $out\) { "OK size: " + [math]::Round\(\(Get-Item $out\).Length/1kb\) + " KB" } else { "NO FILE" })

PowerShell($chrome = "C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"; $out = "C:\\Users\\Carlos Geschäftlich\\Documents\\coding\\corporate-website\\_preview_full.png"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath $chrome -ArgumentList '--headless=new','--disable-gpu','--hide-scrollbars','--window-size=1440,4000','--virtual-time-budget=9000',"--screenshot=$out",'http://localhost:4599/' -NoNewWindow -PassThru -Wait; "exit=$\($p.ExitCode\)"; if \(Test-Path $out\) { "OK " + [math]::Round\(\(Get-Item $out\).Length/1kb\) + " KB" } else { "NO FILE" })

PowerShell($chrome = "C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"; $out = "C:\\Users\\Carlos Geschäftlich\\Documents\\coding\\corporate-website\\_preview_hero.png"; $tmp = Join-Path $env:TEMP \("cr_" + [guid]::NewGuid\(\).ToString\('N'\)\); Start-Process -FilePath $chrome -ArgumentList '--headless=new','--disable-gpu','--no-first-run','--no-default-browser-check',"--user-data-dir=$tmp",'--hide-scrollbars','--window-size=1440,950','--virtual-time-budget=9000',"--screenshot=$out",'http://localhost:4599/' -NoNewWindow -Wait; if \(Test-Path $out\) { "OK " + [math]::Round\(\(Get-Item $out\).Length/1kb\) + " KB" } else { "NO FILE" }; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($chrome = "C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force "C:\\hds_shots" | Out-Null; $tmp = "C:\\hds_shots\\profile"; function Shot\($name,$w,$h\){ $out="C:\\hds_shots\\$name"; Remove-Item $out -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Process -FilePath $chrome -ArgumentList '--headless=new','--disable-gpu','--no-first-run',"--user-data-dir=$tmp",'--hide-scrollbars',"--window-size=$w,$h",'--virtual-time-budget=9000',"--screenshot=$out",'http://localhost:4599/' -NoNewWindow -Wait; if\(Test-Path $out\){"$name OK"}else{"$name NO FILE"} }; Shot "hero.png" 1440 950; Shot "full.png" 1440 7600)

PowerShell($chrome = "C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"; $out="C:\\hds_shots\\tall.png"; Remove-Item $out -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Process -FilePath $chrome -ArgumentList '--headless=new','--disable-gpu','--no-first-run','--user-data-dir=C:\\hds_shots\\profile','--hide-scrollbars','--window-size=1440,10200','--virtual-time-budget=9000',"--screenshot=$out",'http://localhost:4599/' -NoNewWindow -Wait; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img=[System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($out\); "H=$\($img.Height\)"; $y=7200; $h=$img.Height-$y; $bmp=New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($img.Width,$h\); $g=[System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.DrawImage\($img,\(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,0,$img.Width,$h\)\),\(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,$y,$img.Width,$h\)\),[System.Drawing.GraphicsUnit]::Pixel\); $bmp.Save\("C:\\hds_shots\\bottom.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\);$bmp.Dispose\(\);$img.Dispose\(\); "done")

PowerShell($chrome = "C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"; $out="C:\\hds_shots\\xl.png"; Remove-Item $out -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Process -FilePath $chrome -ArgumentList '--headless=new','--disable-gpu','--no-first-run','--user-data-dir=C:\\hds_shots\\profile','--hide-scrollbars','--window-size=1440,12400','--virtual-time-budget=9000',"--screenshot=$out",'http://localhost:4599/' -NoNewWindow -Wait 2>$null; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img=[System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($out\); $y=9600; $h=$img.Height-$y; $bmp=New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($img.Width,$h\); $g=[System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.DrawImage\($img,\(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,0,$img.Width,$h\)\),\(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,$y,$img.Width,$h\)\),[System.Drawing.GraphicsUnit]::Pixel\); $bmp.Save\("C:\\hds_shots\\end.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\);$bmp.Dispose\(\);$img.Dispose\(\); "done h=$h")

PowerShell($chrome = "C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"; $dir="C:\\hds_shots"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $dir | Out-Null; $out="$dir\\live_top.png"; Remove-Item $out -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Process -FilePath $chrome -ArgumentList '--headless=new','--disable-gpu','--no-first-run','--user-data-dir=C:\\hds_shots\\profile2','--hide-scrollbars','--window-size=1440,1100','--virtual-time-budget=12000',"--screenshot=$out",'https://www.hausdesstiftens.org/unternehmen/engagement-mit-geld/' -NoNewWindow -Wait 2>$null; if\(Test-Path $out\){ "OK " + [math]::Round\(\(Get-Item $out\).Length/1kb\) + " KB" } else { "NO FILE" })
